overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a sunlit urban back alley with food vendors, then entering a dimly lit indoor market with neon lighting. The clip transitions from an outdoor industrial alleyway to a bustling interior market space with various stalls and NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban back alley with food vendors and stalls

events.description: camera moves past the blue vending stall and approaches the food cart with umbrella
passes the vendor working at the electric grill station

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the alleyway past various food vendors and stalls

notable_agents.action: character standing near the pink metal door at the alley entrance
vendor in yellow vest grilling food at the electric grill station

entered.detail: bright pink industrial metal door set in dark brown building facade
blue and yellow food vending stall with corrugated metal roof and neon signage
small blue food cart with red and blue umbrella canopy
red electric grill with glowing heating elements and food items cooking

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit urban alley with a distinctive pink door and a blue food vending stall. The camera moves forward past a food cart with a colorful umbrella and approaches a vendor working at an electric grill. The environment features industrial architecture with corrugated metal awnings and scattered debris on the asphalt ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between outdoor alley and indoor market entrance

events.description: approaching the dark entrance to the indoor market building
entering the dark interior from bright sunlight, dramatic lighting shift

agents.ego_description: walking toward and entering the dark indoor market from the sunlit alley

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants and black jacket standing near the entrance railing

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian walkway or highway overpass visible in the distance
large dark opening leading into the indoor market building

segments.scene_description: Moving past the grill vendor, the camera approaches the entrance to an indoor market. An overhead bridge structure becomes visible in the distance. The lighting begins to shift as the camera nears the dark entrance, transitioning from bright natural sunlight to the dim interior. A pedestrian in red pants stands near the entrance railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor food market with various vendor stalls

events.description: fully inside the dimly lit market with blue neon and fluorescent lighting
turns slightly right toward the bar area while navigating between stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the indoor market examining various food stalls and vendor displays

notable_agents.action: female vendor standing behind the food display counter
bartender behind the bar counter preparing drinks

entered.detail: bright green plastic stools arranged near food counters
illuminated glass case showing various food items for sale
green neon arrow sign pointing direction inside the market
long counter with various bottles and serving equipment

segments.scene_description: Now fully inside the market, the scene is illuminated by artificial neon and fluorescent lights. The camera moves past green plastic stools and glass food display cases. The environment features industrial ceilings with exposed beams and various market stalls. A bar area becomes visible on the right side with a bartender behind the counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: market bar area with NPC interactions and dialogue

events.description: dialogue prompt appears on screen for interaction with the bartender NPC
turns away from the bar and moves toward the market exit

agents.ego_description: approaching the bar counter and engaging in conversation with the bartender NPC

notable_agents.action: bartender leaning on the bar counter engaging in dialogue with the player
two NPCs conversing near the bar area, one in a blue jacket

entered.detail: large decorative blue and white ceramic vases on the bar counter
illuminated menu displays hanging above the bar area
large ventilation ducts and pipes on the industrial ceiling

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the bar area of the indoor market. The camera approaches the bar counter where a bartender stands behind large blue and white porcelain vases. Dialogue text appears on screen indicating interaction. Other NPCs are visible conversing in the area. The environment features neon menu boards and industrial ventilation systems overhead as the camera moves through the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sunlit industrial alleyway into the neon-lit depths of a bustling indoor market. It begins by moving past a pink door and a blue food stall, gliding past a vendor at an electric grill under corrugated metal awnings. As the camera approaches a dark entrance marked by a pedestrian in red pants, the bright natural sunlight fades, transitioning into a dim interior beneath an overhead bridge structure. The scene then opens into a market space illuminated by artificial fluorescent lights, moving past green plastic stools and glass display cases under exposed industrial beams. Finally, the camera pushes toward a bar area featuring blue and white porcelain vases and neon menu boards, coming to a stop as dialogue text appears during an interaction with the bartender.
